name: Vicente Archer
abstract: Vicente Archer (born in Woodstock, New York ) is an American jazz bassist, composer and bandleader having performed with John Scofield, Nicholas Payton, Robert Glasper, Norah Jones, Amos Lee and many others. He has appeared on 5 Grammy Nominated and 2 Grammy Winning Recordings

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: Oh Damion Reid and Vicente Archer. The trio. I go back with them since 2000.
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016
